name: @cheshire/layerzero-omnichain
description: Cheshire LayerZero omnichain notes and interface stubs (Solana ↔ Robinhood). Canonical OApp/OFT implementations live in my-lz-oapp/.

scripts.check:structure: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['README.md','foundry.toml','layerzero.config.ts']) { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) { console.error('missing', f); process.exit(1);} } console.log('ok');"
